one_line: Standalone stdlib mcnemar.py computes paired McNemar (exact binomial + Holm correction) for all 10 condition pairs per family; ran on real A1/A2 pass@k JSONs, reproduced A2's discordant counts exactly, and reports real p-values (REx significant vs every control p<1e-6 both models; best_of_n-vs-zero_shot loses significance under Holm on deepseek).
